paper_focus.title: Tensile deformation behavior analysis of low density Fe–18Mn–10Al–xC steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To clarify the differences in strain hardening behavior among Fe–18Mn–10Al–xC steels with varying carbon contents by correlating microstructural phase constituents and deformation-induced dislocation structures using Crussard–Jaoul analysis.
main_process_variables: Hot rolling at 1200 °C after homogenization for 3h to 3.5 mm thickness (90% reduction)
Final annealing at 1000 °C followed by water quenching
Tensile testing at room temperature with initial strain rate 1.33×10^{-3} s^{-1}
